    1. AttributeConstants()

Class AttributeConstants

java.lang.Object
se.swedenconnect.opensaml.eidas.ext.attributes.AttributeConstants
public class AttributeConstants extends Object
Constant values for attribute names defined in eIDAS SAML Attribute Profile.
Author:
Martin Lindström
